title: biscutella apula var. columnae
intro: Biscutella apula var. columnae, also known as Columna's biscutella, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Biscutella apula var. columnae include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
